category_sources: Official GitHub README says envchain secures credential environment variables in macOS Keychain or D-Bus secret service: https://github.com/sorah/envchain
source_facts.description says Secure your credentials in environment variables.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README heading use envchain: https://github.com/sorah/envchain
docs_sources: Official README provides requirements, installation, usage, and options: https://github.com/sorah/envchain#readme.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/sorah/envchain; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include gnome-keyring, security, credentials, secret, and keychain.
Official README says envchain secures credential environment variables in macOS Keychain and D-Bus secret service/gnome-keyring: https://github.com/sorah/envchain#readme.
